posts/post_1.title: Upcoming CML Anniversary Long-Service Awards Nominations
posts/post_1.content: Team, please remember to submit your nominations for the annual Long-Service awards. Let's celebrate our hardworking leaders who have been with CML since inception under our Fiji properties!

posts/post_1/comments/comm1.content: Outstanding! I would love to nominate Litia from Housekeeping. She is incredible.

complaints-ramada/comp_1.title: Air Conditioner Noise

updates.message: Assigned technician Savenaca to inspect unit.
